prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次约25921→40489→28602→30690→44443，波动剧烈，2022年因批次合并及专业组细分出现大幅后移，2023–2024年有所回升，2025年再次 大幅后移至44443名，近3年整体呈后移趋势；该校在安徽省物理类招生计划2021年65人、2022年49人、2023年48人、2024年58人、2025年70人；2026年计 划83人，较2025年扩招约18.6%，连续两年扩招，扩招趋势明显。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 辽宁大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年约第125名，近年排名稳定在1 25–131区间，属于中游211层次；该校在声誉舆情文件中未见明显负面或正面事件，声誉平稳；抖音综合热度排名第105，评价为「一般」，短视频曝光量较低， 未形成明显的报考关注升温信号；历史投档异常记录中无辽宁大学相关信号；第五轮学科评估中，应用经济学为A-，是该校唯一A-及以上学科，对应金融学类、 经济学类、财政学、经济统计学等物理类招生专业，对相关专业报考有一定吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 2026年专业热度数据显示，计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程持 续高热推荐，法学分化观望，金融/财经/经济分化观望；该校物理类招生专业涵盖计算机、电子信息、电气、金融、法学等，热门工科专业热度高，经管类分化；安徽省2026年高 考总报名约45.1万人，物理类考生数估算约31.4万，较2025年32.1万减少约2.1%，竞争环境略有缓和；辽宁大学位于辽宁省沈阳 市，在安徽省属跨省招生；该校在安徽物理类招生计划从70人增至83人，扩招幅度较大，对安徽考生报考意愿有正向激励作用。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次近3年持续后移、2 026年物理类扩招约18.6%、安徽省物理类考生数略减约2.1%以及声誉平稳等因素，扩招带来的位次后移效应占主导，但考生减少略有对冲；在2025年基准44443名基础上，预测202 6年物理类最低位次约49314名，区间48814–49814名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category fluctuated significantly: approximately 25921 → 40489 → 28602 → 30690 → 44443. In 2022, due to batch consolidation and detailed major group division, there was a substantial backward shift. Rankings recovered somewhat in 2023–2024, but in 2025 they again dropped sharply to 44443. Over the past three years, the overall trend has been a backward shift. The enrollment plan for Physics Category in Anhui was 65 in 2021, 49 in 2022, 48 in 2023, 58 in 2024, and 70 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 83, an increase of about 18.6% compared to 2025, with two consecutive years of expansion, showing a clear trend of enrollment growth.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Liaoning University is a Project 211 and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Ranking, it is approximately 125th, with recent rankings stable in the 125–131 range, placing it in the mid-tier 211 level. The university's reputation is stable, with no significant negative or positive events found in reputation and public opinion documents. Its Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking is 105, rated as 'average', with low short video exposure and no clear signal of increased application attention. There are no signals related to Liaoning University in historical abnormal admission records. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Applied Economics was rated A-, the only A- or above discipline, corresponding to Physics Category majors such as Finance, Economics, Public Finance, and Economic Statistics, which have some appeal for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: 2026 major popularity data shows that Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to be highly recommended, Law is divided with a wait-and-see attitude, and Finance/Economics/Economy is also divided with a wait-and-see attitude. The university's Physics Category majors include Computer Science, Electronic Information, Electrical Engineering, Finance, Law, etc. Popular engineering majors have high demand, while economics and management majors are divided. In 2026, the total number of Anhui Gaokao registrants is about 451,000, with an estimated 314,000 Physics Category candidates, a decrease of about 2.1% from 325,000 in 2025, slightly easing competition. Liaoning University is located in Shenyang, Liaoning Province, and recruits across provinces in Anhui. The enrollment plan for Physics Category in Anhui increased from 70 to 83, a significant expansion, positively encouraging Anhui candidates' willingness to apply.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward shift in historical rankings over the past three years, the approximately 18.6% expansion in Physics Category enrollment in 2026, the slight decrease of about 2.1% in Anhui Physics Category candidates, and stable reputation, the backward shift effect from expansion dominates, but the decrease in candidates provides a slight offset. Based on the 2025 baseline of 44443, the predicted minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 is approximately 49314, with a range of 48814–49814.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 48814–49814, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit (e.g., within 48500), prioritize competitive Tier 1 engineering majors like Computer Science and Electronic Information. If the ranking is close to the upper limit (e.g., above 49800), it is advisable to mainly rely on Tier 3 majors for safety, with Tier 2 majors such as economics, management, and law as stable choices.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 4700 → 6872 → 5264 → 5499 → 5893, showing overall significant fluctuation. In 2022, due to batch merging, there was a noticeable backward shift. In the recent three years (2023–2025), it oscillated narrowly within the 5264–5893 range, with the 2025 baseline around 5893. The university's enrollment plan for History Category in Anhui Province was 28 in 2021, 27 in 2022, 28 in 2023, 30 in 2024, and 30 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 38, an increase of about 26.7% compared to 2025, a relatively large expansion, which is expected to ease competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Liaoning University is a Project 211 and Double First-Class construction university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it is approximately 125th, with recent rankings stable in the 125–131 range, placing it at the mid-tier 211 level. The university's reputation file shows no significant negative or positive events, indicating a stable reputation. Its Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking is 105, rated as 'average', with low short video exposure, showing no clear signs of increased application attention. There are no signals related to Liaoning University in historical admission anomaly records. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Applied Economics was rated A-, the only A- or above discipline at the university, corresponding to enrollment majors such as Finance, Economics, Public Finance, and Economic Statistics, which have some appeal for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: 2026 major popularity data shows that Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering, and Computer Science continue to be highly recommended, while Law, Finance/Finance/Economics show divergence and wait-and-see. The university's History Category enrollment majors are mainly in economics/management and humanities, with related major categories having stable but divergent popularity. The total number of candidates registered for the 2026 Gaokao in Anhui Province is approximately 451,000, slightly decreasing from about 462,000 (History + Physics categories) in 2025. The estimated number of History Category candidates is about 137,000, a decrease of about 3.4% from 141,000 in 2025, indicating a slightly eased competitive environment. Liaoning University is located in Shenyang City, Liaoning Province, and recruits across provinces in Anhui. The university's enrollment plan for History Category in Anhui increased from 30 to 38, a relatively large expansion, which positively encourages Anhui candidates' willingness to apply.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the narrow oscillation of historical rankings in the recent three years, the significant expansion of about 26.7% in History Category in 2026, the slight decrease of about 3.4% in History Category candidates in Anhui Province, and the stable reputation, the ranking backward shift effect from expansion dominates, but the decrease in candidates provides some offset. Based on the 2025 baseline of 5893, the predicted minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 is approximately 6786, with a range of 6286–7286.
